demo.title: consign-token.sh
demo.code:
# 0. Confirm COINHERO_API_KEY is set in Bankr Tools → Environment Variables

# 1. Authorize a consignment deal
curl -X POST https://my.coinhero.fun/api/agent/deals/authorize \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $COINHERO_API_KEY" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"tokenAddress":"0x...","managerAddress":"0x...","tokenName":"My Token","tokenSymbol":"MTK","tokenDecimals":18,"dailyPurchaseUsd":10}'

# 2. Validate returned transactions per SKILL.md (ConsignmentManager 0x677378ab968D0e1116bCE42395B8E05f2B004D78, chainId 8453)
#    Require explicit user confirmation, then sign and broadcast transaction.data from managerAddress

# 3. Deposit tokens (compute amount from currentPrice + tokenDecimals; confirm with user before signing)
curl -X POST https://my.coinhero.fun/api/agent/deals/{dealId}/deposit \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $COINHERO_API_KEY" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"amount":"5000000000000000000"}'

# 4. Poll at most hourly until status === active
curl https://my.coinhero.fun/api/agent/deals/{dealId} \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $COINHERO_API_KEY"

setup: Get an API key at https://my.coinhero.fun via the BANKR Agent Quick Start wizard (Step 2); keys start with chk_ and are shown once
Set COINHERO_API_KEY in Bankr Tools → Environment Variables — never paste the key in chat
Your bot wallet (EOA) needs Base ETH for gas and must hold the ERC-20 tokens you want to consign
Minimum initial deposit: $50 USD worth of your token before the deal goes live

Validate all returned transactions against ConsignmentManager 0x677378ab968D0e1116bCE42395B8E05f2B004D78 before signing; require explicit user confirmation for deposits, withdrawals, and config changes
